purpose: 人员使用记录子表，记录报工单的人员配置、班次及工时

purpose: 生产订单主表，状态机：开立→下发→开工→完工→关闭（开工/完工由报工单状态自动联动）
fields: [{"name":"order_id","type":"INTEGER","nullable":true,"primaryKey":true,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"订单ID（主键）"},{"name":"order_no","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"订单编号（MO-16+YYMMDD+3位序号）"},{"name":"material_id","type":"UUID","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"料品ID（关联bas_material）"},{"name":"material_code","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"料品编码"},{"name":"material_name","type":"VARCHAR(100)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"料品名称"},{"name":"specification","type":"VARCHAR(200)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"规格型号"},{"name":"film_version","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"菲林版本（来自料品档案film_no）"},{"name":"version_no","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"版本号"},{"name":"planned_qty","type":"DECIMAL(12,2)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"0","comment":"计划数量（正整数，仅开立状态可修改）"},{"name":"finished_qty","type":"DECIMAL(12,2)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"0","comment":"已完工数量"},{"name":"plan_start_time","type":"DATETIME","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"计划开始时间（不得早于今天）"},{"name":"plan_end_time","type":"DATETIME","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"计划完成时间（不得早于计划开始日期）"},{"name":"status","type":"TINYINT","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"0","comment":"订单状态（0开立 1下发 2开工 3完工 4关闭）"},{"name":"release_time","type":"DATETIME","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"下发时间"},{"name":"close_time","type":"DATETIME","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"关闭时间"},{"name":"created_by","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"创建人"},{"name":"created_at","type":"DATETIME","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"创建时间"},{"name":"updated_at","type":"DATETIME","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"更新时间"}]

fields: [{"name":"dict_id","type":"INTEGER","nullable":true,"primaryKey":true,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"字典ID（主键）"},{"name":"table_name","type":"VARCHAR(100)","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"表名"},{"name":"category","type":"VARCHAR(50)","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"业务表","comment":"表分类（系统表/基础数据表/业务表）"},{"name":"purpose","type":"VARCHAR(500)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"表用途说明"},{"name":"field_count","type":"INTEGER","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"0","comment":"字段数"},{"name":"record_count","type":"INTEGER","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":"0","comment":"记录数"},{"name":"fields","type":"TEXT","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"字段列表（JSON）"},{"name":"last_update","type":"DATETIME","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"最后更新时间"},{"name":"created_at","type":"DATETIME","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"创建时间"},{"name":"updated_at","type":"DATETIME","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"更新时间"}]

purpose: 报工单图片记录子表，统一存储报工单关联的不良/标签/异常图片
fields: [{"name":"image_id","type":"INTEGER","nullable":true,"primaryKey":true,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"图片ID（主键）"},{"name":"report_order_id","type":"INTEGER","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"生产报工单ID（关联production_report_order）"},{"name":"category","type":"VARCHAR(30)","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"图片分类（defect不良/label标签/exception异常）"},{"name":"image_url","type":"VARCHAR(500)","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"图片访问路径"},{"name":"file_hash","type":"VARCHAR(64)","nullable":true,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"文件哈希（MD5/SHA-256，用于去重）"},{"name":"created_at","type":"DATETIME","nullable":false,"primaryKey":false,"defaultValue":null,"comment":"创建时间"}]
